# claude-swarm

> CLI for parallel Claude Code sessions to coordinate via SQLite.

claude-swarm lets multiple AI coding agents (Claude Code sessions) working on the same codebase stay in sync, communicate, claim files, review each other's work, and push safely through a shared git lock. All state lives in a single SQLite database.

## Install

    pip install claude-swarm

    # or via Homebrew
    brew tap laurenalexander2/tap && brew install claude-swarm

Requires Python 3.11+.

## Quick Start

    ao setup                                    # verify Claude Code is installed
    ao start "Build a REST API with auth"       # launch orchestrator mode

This writes a CLAUDE.md, creates .claude-swarm/, launches Claude Code as orchestrator. The orchestrator decomposes the project into workstreams and prints copy-pasteable prompts for each session.

## Documentation

- llms-full.txt  — Complete reference (every command, every schema table, workflow)
- commands.txt   — CLI command reference only
- schema.txt     — Database schema only

## Source

- GitHub: https://github.com/laurenalexander2/claude-swarm
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/claude-swarm/

## Commands (summary)

    claude-swarm init --sessions "A:frontend B:backend"
    claude-swarm status
    claude-swarm sync --session A
    claude-swarm context add "API uses snake_case" --session A --category decision
    claude-swarm context show
    claude-swarm message B "expose the auth types?" --from A
    claude-swarm inbox --session B
    claude-swarm reply 1 "Done" --from B
    claude-swarm update A --status blocked --note "waiting on B"
    claude-swarm claim src/auth.py --session A
    claude-swarm claims
    claude-swarm unclaim src/auth.py --session A
    claude-swarm review request --from A --to B --diff "$(git diff main)"
    claude-swarm review list
    claude-swarm review show 1
    claude-swarm review approve 1 --from B --comment "lgtm"
    claude-swarm review reject 1 --from B --comment "fix types"
    claude-swarm merge-ok A
    claude-swarm commit "add middleware" --session A
    claude-swarm push --session A
    claude-swarm pull --session A
    claude-swarm git-status
    claude-swarm git-diff --staged
    claude-swarm git-log
    claude-swarm orchestrate run --interval 10 --auto-approve
    claude-swarm orchestrate dashboard
